summary: Iteration 143: FOH Command Dashboard + Guest 360 Hub + IRD/Minibar Hub + Intelligence Adapter - All 47 backend tests passed. Tested 4 new router files with 36+ endpoints. Fixed 2 bugs during testing: (1) foh_ops.py floor_view datetime comparison error (offset-naive vs offset-aware), (2) intelligence_adapter.py route order issue (/ai3/summary must come before /ai3/{module}). All seed endpoints idempotent. No MongoDB _id leaks in any response. Cross-module event emission verified.
critical_code_review_comments: foh_ops.py floor_view had datetime comparison bug (offset-naive vs offset-aware) - FIXED
intelligence_adapter.py had route order issue (/ai3/summary was after /ai3/{module}, causing 404) - FIXED
All new modules properly use _strip() or {'_id': 0} projection to prevent MongoDB _id leaks

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: floor_view endpoint had TypeError: can't subtract offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added _parse_eta helper function to ensure timezone-aware datetime comparison

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: /api/intelligence/ai3/summary returned 404 because route was defined after /ai3/{module}

seed_data_creation: Used seed endpoints: POST /api/foh-ops/seed, POST /api/guest360-hub/seed, POST /api/ird-hub/seed. Created test reservations, orders, and profiles with TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 143 adds 4 major backend modules: (1) FOH COMMAND DASHBOARD (/api/foh-ops/*) - 14 endpoints for outlets, reservations, pacing, beverage performance, walk-in surge, recovery. 9 outlets seeded. Director/GM/Floor Manager role views. (2) GUEST 360 HUB (/api/guest360-hub/*) - 8 endpoints for guest profiles with notes, concierge history, reservations, spa touchpoints. PII sanitization for 'drunk', SSN patterns. (3) IRD/MINIBAR HUB (/api/ird-hub/*) - 10 endpoints for menu, orders, minibar state. Uses distinct collections (ird_hub_menu, ird_hub_orders, ird_hub_minibar_state) to avoid clashing with pre-existing /api/ird module. (4) INTELLIGENCE ADAPTER (/api/intelligence/*) - 4 endpoints: ai3/{module} for per-module insights, ai3/summary for all combined, aurium/gm for GM roll-up, stratus/forecast for 6-week forecasting. All deterministic (rule-based), no LLM required. IMPORTANT: /ai3/summary route must come BEFORE /ai3/{module} in FastAPI route order.
